title: ÜSMERA (Medical Radiation Application and Research Center) News
content:
ÜSMERA (Medical Radiation Application and Research Center) News

ÜSMERA Officially Launched

Üsküdar University, Turkey's only thematic university in the field of Behavioral Sciences and Health, has added a new one to its scientific research activities. Üsküdar University Medical Radiation Research and Application Center (ÜSMERA) has started its scientific life with the main objectives of being a pioneer in R&D projects in this field and supporting researchers. All scientific activities to be held within the center will be announced to researchers via the official website and official facebook page.
